name: Paper.io 2
description:
Join millions of players in the world’s most satisfying .io game!

Paper.io 2 is a fun multiplayer game built around one simple idea: move across the arena, draw a trail to expand your territory, and capture the zone before an enemy crosses your path. It’s a fast-paced territory capture battle that's easy to learn but hard to master!

SATISFYING DRAWING & ARCADE GAMEPLAY
Experience the smoothest and most addictive experience in the io games genre. Everything is designed to feel right, from the smooth expansion to the addictive rush of watching your color conquer the entire map.
Psst—rumor has it something crazy happens if you capture the whole map at once. Think you can pull it off?

FAST-PACED ONLINE MULTIPLAYER
Forget long tutorials and jump straight into the online area. The rules are simple: draw, close, claim. Whether you’re looking for a quick 1-minute match or a deep strategic battle, it fits your schedule perfectly!

COLLECT & CUSTOMIZE 100+ SKINS
Unlock a massive library of skins and avatars to personalize your look. Show off your style to friends and rivals as you expand your territory and collect free daily rewards along the way!

So… will you play it safe, or are you going for the big steal? Download Paper.io 2 now and join the arena for free!

name: Helix Jump
description:
Helix Jump is a 3d arcade game where players smash, bump and bounce through revolving helix platforms to reach the end.
Sound easy? You wish!


Your ball drops like a brick through colorful helix platforms that block its descent, but if you hit a red spot, it's all over! Your ball shatters to pieces and you have to start your fall all over again.


But even traps platforms are no match for a fireball falling at full speed! Choose your strategy: speed up like a madman or stop and wait for your next chance to roll and jump. Other ball games wish they were this fun!


Why Helix Jump rules:
- Crazy fast speed
- Fun gameplay
- Bright vibrant graphics
- Simple and easy to play
- Great time killer

name: BeReal: Photos & Friends Daily
description:
BeReal is the simplest photo-sharing app where you and your friends post once a day to show what you’re really up to.

Every day at a random time, everyone gets the same two-minute window to take and share a photo. The camera snaps both the front and back simultaneously, capturing the real moment. No filters — just real life, as it happens.

You won’t find influencers here. You’ll find your friends making coffee, walking to class, lying on the floor, laughing at nothing, or stuck in traffic. It’s not about looking perfect. It’s about being present and staying connected in a way that’s honest, unfiltered, and sometimes unintentionally hilarious.

Post on time or post late—it still counts. Comment, react with your face using RealMojis, or just scroll through your circle’s day. Your BeReal feed is private by default, unless you choose to go public and see what others are up to around the world.

If you’re tired of chasing clout and scrolling endless edits, BeReal is your once-a-day reset. One daily notification. Two minutes. Real friends, real moments.

Download BeReal and join the social network that’s not trying to be one.

name: Collect Em All! Clear the Dots
description:
Collect Em All! – The Ultimate Color Match Puzzle Adventure

Get ready for the most satisfying and addictive puzzle experience! In Collect Em All, your mission is simple: connect balls of the same color, crush through challenging puzzles, and climb your way to the top of the global leaderboard.

Connect. Crush. Conquer.

Swipe to link colorful balls and create explosive chains! The longer your chain, the bigger the blast—and the better your score. Clear the board, beat the level goals, and unlock powerful boosters to help you on your journey.

Easy to Play, Hard to Master!

◉ Tap and drag to connect adjacent balls of the same color
◉ Complete each level’s objectives before running out of moves
◉ Use strategy to create super long chains and trigger combos
◉ Blast your way through thousands of handcrafted levels!

Power-Ups & Boosters:

◉ Rocket: Clears a full row or column
◉ Bomb: Blasts a big area in one tap
◉ Shuffle: Rearranges the board for fresh opportunities
Unlock new boosters as you progress!

Game Features:

◉ Satisfying color match gameplay that’s perfect for quick sessions
◉ Thousands of fun and challenging levels with increasing difficulty
◉ Exciting daily rewards, missions, and special timed events
◉ Play anytime, anywhere – no Wi-Fi required
◉ Compete with friends and players worldwide on global leaderboards
◉ Beautiful, bright visuals and smooth animations
◉ Regular updates with new levels, challenges & surprises!

Whether you’re looking to relax or seeking a brain-teasing challenge, Collect Em All delivers a colorful and dynamic puzzle experience that never gets boring.

Perfect For Fans Of:

◉ Match 3 and blast games
◉ Color linking puzzles
◉ Strategy and logic-based mobile games
◉ Addictive games with progression and reward loops

Download Collect Em All now and start your ball-connecting adventure. The puzzle world is waiting—can you collect them all?

name: Archery Clash!
description:
► Archery Clash: Master Cold Weapon Combat in Epic 3D Archery Duels!

Enter the thrilling arena of Archery Clash, where the essence of shooter sports and cold weapon mastery culminates in the ultimate showdown. Embrace your role as a legendary archer, mastering the bow, spear, and axe to outsmart and outmaneuver your adversaries. With every precise throw and strategic strike, engage in epic 3D duels that test your precision, strategy, and archery skills. Are you ready to claim your victory and ascend to the ranks of the bowmasters?

► Strategic Shooter & Archery Gameplay

Dive into strategic, turn-based duels where every decision can turn the tide of battle. Select your weapon wisely from a quiver full of bows, spears, and axes, and master the ancient art of knife throwing. Each weapon offers unique gameplay advantages, perfect for PvP enthusiasts and fans of combat archery simulators.

► Progress & Customize: RPG-Style Upgrades

Victory in the arena unlocks a trove of upgrades and legendary gear, propelling your prowess in this competitive sports arena. From the classic bow to the formidable hatchet, customize your arsenal to fit your combat style, making every tournament and betting match a display of your unique talents.

► Engage in Thrilling Competitions & Betting Tournaments

Rise through the ranks in exhilarating PvP tournaments, showcasing your skills as a true master of archery and cold weapons. Engage in a unique betting system that adds a thrilling layer of strategy to every duel, rewarding the bold and the skilled.

► Skill-Based Challenges for Archery Enthusiasts

Archery Clash is a test of tactical intellect as much as it is of precision. Anticipate your opponent's moves and perfect your aim and timing to dominate the battlefield. This archery simulator offers a true skill-based challenge that will appeal to both experienced archers and newcomers.

► Embark on an Unforgettable Archery Adventure

Archery Clash isn't just a game—it's a journey into the heart of archery, blending RPG elements, strategic depth, and intense PvP action. Whether you're here for the girls wielding bows or the adrenaline-pumping tournaments, Archery Clash has something for every archery enthusiast. Download now and step into a world where only the sharpest shooters and strategists prevail."

name: Helix Jump+
description:
The iconic hyper-casual arcade sensation reimagined for Apple Arcade! Helix Jump+ brings the ultimate bouncing adventure to a whole new level.

Get ready to dive into a hypnotic world of color, rhythm, and precision as you drop through twisting helix towers in this thrilling physics-based game.
Your mission? Guide your ball through rotating platforms, avoiding traps and hazards as you descend toward victory. Sounds easy? You wish!
Simple to pick up, endlessly fun, and surprisingly challenging — this is the definitive Helix Jump experience.

Precision Meets Momentum
Feel every bounce and smash with reworked haptics and enhanced visual effects. Time your drops perfectly, use momentum to your advantage, and unleash powerful speed boosts to break through multiple platforms in one go!

Play Anytime, Anywhere
No ads. No interruptions. Just pure arcade action. Helix Jump+ is fully playable offline, so the fun never stops — even when you’re on the go.

A Classic, Reborn
With millions of players around the world, Helix Jump became a genre-defining hit. Helix Jump+ takes everything you loved and enhances it for a premium experience — only on Apple Arcade. ENJOY!

name: Captain TNT
description:
Unleash your inner demolition expert in Captain TNT, the ultimate building destruction game! With a wide array of powerful explosives at your disposal, it's time to bring down structures in spectacular fashion. Strategize your blasts, place your dynamite carefully, and watch the chaos unfold as buildings crumble to the ground.

Features:
Variety of Explosives: Use dynamite, bombs, barrels, and detonators to demolish different structures. Challenging Levels: Each level presents unique challenges and structures to destroy. Realistic Physics: Enjoy lifelike destruction with our advanced physics engine. Strategic Gameplay: Plan your demolition carefully to achieve the best results and unlock new levels. Stunning Graphics: Experience high-quality graphics that bring the demolition action to life. Intuitive Controls: Easy-to-use controls that make blowing up buildings fun and accessible.

Gameplay:
In Captain TNT, your mission is simple: destroy various buildings using a range of explosive tools. From dynamite sticks to powerful bombs, every explosive has its own unique effect. Place them strategically to maximize the damage and ensure the complete demolition of each structure. As you progress, levels become more challenging, requiring careful planning and precise execution.

Whether you're looking for a quick burst of explosive fun or a deep, strategic demolition experience, Captain TNT has something for everyone. Join the ranks of demolition experts and show off your skills in the most explosive game on mobile!

Download Captain TNT now and start demolishing buildings with the most powerful explosives available! Get ready for explosive fun and strategic demolition like never before.

name: Sand Loop
description:
Discover Sand Loop, a uniquely relaxing puzzle experience where you collect the sand from the beautiful sand art which is very satisfying to watch and play. Guide moving buckets along a conveyor belt, collect sand by color, and watch as each level comes to life in a smooth cascade of motion. Every grain falls with realistic physics, creating a mesmerizing and satisfying visual journey.

Whether you’re looking to unwind after a long day or enjoy a simple yet engaging puzzle, Sand Loop delivers a calming escape with every tap.

How to Play:

- Tap to release and guide buckets along the conveyor
- Collect the right color sand in the right place
- Fill each section to gradually reveal the hidden artwork
- Adapt to new obstacles and level layouts as you progress
- Complete the picture and enjoy the satisfying finish

Easy to learn, but increasingly engaging as new challenges appear!

Why You’ll Love Sand Loop:

Feel the perfect balance between relaxation and puzzle-solving. Each level is designed to provide a steady sense of progress, where simple actions lead to beautiful results. With smooth animations and soothing effects, the experience is both calming and rewarding.

Game Features:

- Unique sand-flow puzzle gameplay with intuitive tap controls
- Visually satisfying sand physics and fluid motion
- Hundreds of handcrafted levels with increasing challenge
- Creative level designs with new mechanics and obstacles
- Stunning artworks revealed piece by piece
- Relaxing sound effects and calming visual style
- Smooth performance for a seamless experience
- Play anytime, anywhere at your own pace

Take a moment for yourself.

Let the sand flow, complete each design, and enjoy a truly relaxing puzzle experience.

Download Sand Loop now and start your journey.

name: Battle Bag: War Zone
description:
Gear up and dive into the tactical world of Battle Bag: War Zone — a fresh twist on squad strategy and auto-battler action! Plan your loadout, arrange your gear, and watch your soldiers deploy themselves on the battlefield. Your brain is the trigger — pack smart or perish!

Key Features

Bag-Based Strategy: Arrange soldiers and weapons inside your bag grid. Every placement counts — your layout determines your firepower!
Auto-Battle Warfare: Once packed, your squad auto-deploys and fights off waves of enemies — no manual controls, just pure tactical satisfaction!
Modern Military Units: Equip rifles, shotguns, knives and more. Each weapon powers a specific unit — Riflemen, Shotgunners, and close-combat specialists.
Wave-Based Combat: Face off against relentless enemy waves and tough bosses. Earn rewards, unlock better gear, and upgrade your strategy!
Minimalist, Clean Visuals: Sharp, modern aesthetics with high contrast and smooth animations. Easy to read, hard to master.

Are you ready to outsmart the battlefield, one bag at a time? Download now and show them the power of perfect packing in Battle Bag: War Zone!

name: Throw Blocks!

name: Gear Fight!
description:
It's time to build a well oiled machine to take down these pesky enemies! First, place down some gears. Then, put your newly constructed factory to the test versus all of the evil enemies!

You will face many different choices on what to use to take on these challenging enemies. Will you utilize the range abilities of your archers? Or will you brute force your way to victory?!

Do you have what it takes to build a flawless factory of brutes, archers, and grunts? Manage your budget, and take them all down! It's time to get these gears spinning and it's time to get you winning!

name: Rage Swarm
description:
Welcome to an exciting top down shooter.

Take powerful weapons and make your way through a huge number of enemies in order to get to the boss and eliminate him. Don't forget to pick up useful improvements during the mission to make it easier to complete the tasks at hand.

A variety of equipment will help you overcome the difficulties in the battle with fierce enemies. Improve your skills, perform unique challenges, enter the rage mode and defeat the army of enemies. Eliminate the main boss and clear the territory from the fierce invaders.

A huge number of weapons will give you an unforgettable shooting experience! You have access to a wide variety of weapons, up to exotic rocket launchers and flamethrowers! A lot of fun is guaranteed. Each weapon is unique and has its own distinctive abilities. In addition to weapons, you have access to a huge amount of different equipment! Like weapons, each outfit gives you unique abilities that will make the gameplay as diverse as possible and help you defeat an army of enemies.

The maximum convenient one-finger control allows you to deeply immerse yourself in the game process. Focus on shooting, use the environment to dodge enemy bullets, think through the tactics of movement, select the necessary equipment to fulfill the tasks!

If you are ready to dive into the world of a unique shooter, Rage Swarm is your way to victory.

name: Card Factory! Relaxing Puzzle
description:
Master the Flow. Sort the Chaos.



Dive into the most satisfying sorting puzzle on the App Store! In Card Factory, your job is simple but addictive: choose cards to get into the conveyor belts and match the colored boxes.



THE CHALLENGE:
If a card doesn't find a match, it goes to the "Dock." Watch out—if the Dock overflows, the factory stops! Use your logic to manage the flow and keep the factory running smoothly.


WHY YOU’LL LOVE IT:

Satisfying ASMR Gameplay. Immerse yourself in the smooth flow of the factory. Enjoy the crisp "clicks" and "whooshes" as every card finds its place. No timers, no stress—just pure, relaxing strategy.



Brain-Teasing Mechanics
Things get tricky! Master advanced tools to clear the cards:



-Teleports: Warp around the conveyor.
-Ice Clusters: Break through frozen obstacles.
-Lock & Keys: Solve the sequence to unlock the path.
-Hidden Cards: Reveal hidden colors at the last second!



Always Something New
Compete in the "Nuclear Quest," race in the "Propeller Rush," or climb the "Wind Tower" for big rewards. With new Daily Missions you’ll never run out of fun.


Play Offline

Perfect for your commute. Enjoy the full game without WiFi or data.


Download Card Factory now and start your sorting journey!

name: Last Survivor - Zombie Shooter
description:
Survive the relentless onslaught of the undead and rogue human factions in this intense third-person shooter, set in a gritty post-apocalyptic world. Your survival depends on sharp shooting, tactical decisions, and quick thinking as you face ruthless zombie hordes, rival human groups, and formidable bosses. Will you emerge as the ultimate Zombie Survivor in this chaotic wasteland?

SIMPLE CONTROLS, THRILLING SURVIVAL SHOOTING With intuitive controls, just aim, shoot, and take cover! No complex button mashing—release your finger to dodge and reload. The controls are easy to pick up, but the challenge intensifies as you progress through waves of zombies and enemies. It's fast-paced survival shooting at its finest.

UNLEASH MASSIVE DESTRUCTION As you advance, unlock powerful consumables to tip the scales in your favor. Heal with medkits, call in devastating drone strikes, or unleash grenades on your foes. Whether you're in a Mafia Shootout or facing hordes of zombies, you'll need every weapon in your arsenal to survive.

GEAR UP FOR THE FIGHT Equip yourself with a Helmet, Vest, and Boots to increase your combat power. Merge identical items to upgrade your gear and create more powerful, high-tier equipment. Customize your character’s stats and appearance to fit your playstyle and become the deadliest survivor.

LOOT AND UPGRADE Play to earn crate boxes filled with gear, upgrade materials, and valuable currencies. Discover a variety of weapons to enhance your loadout, from Soldier Shooting precision rifles to heavy-duty Weapon Shooting firepower. Every crate brings you closer to dominating the battlefield.

ACHIEVEMENTS AND GLORY Prove your skills by unlocking achievements as you take down enemies and bosses. Only the best can claim victory in this unforgiving world.

FACE EPIC BOSSES Take on the deadliest foes in Boss Rush mode, where each boss presents new challenges. Survive these high-stakes battles to earn special rewards and cement your legacy in this apocalyptic wasteland.

A WORLD TORN APART The world has fallen into chaos. As the last hope, it’s up to you to take on the threats of this ruined land, from Mafia shootouts to endless waves of zombies. Equip your weapons, devise your strategy, and fight for survival in this immersive post-apocalyptic shooter.

Key Features:

Intuitive survival shooting controls for fast-paced action
Unleash powerful consumables to turn the tide of battle
Upgrade your gear for stronger combat abilities
Discover rare loot and upgrades through crate boxes
Achievements to unlock for bragging rights
Face epic boss battles in Boss Rush mode
Get ready for an exhilarating fight for survival. Download Last Survivor - Zombie Shooter now and see if you can outlast the outbreak!

name: Heisting
description:
What could be more exciting than the thrill of a perfectly executed heist? In Heisting you are set into the role of a masterful thief who embarks on a stealing spree across the world's most luxurious museums, galleries, banks and many more. Gather your crew of robbers and hash out the perfect plan as you progress through increasingly difficult levels.

If things go wrong, and believe me they will go wrong, it will be up to your skills to shoot your way out to safety. Choose your upgrades carefully as they could be a difference between a big pay day and a messy failure.

As you progress, you will need to convince more and more robbers to join your gang and help you with your heists. In order for the heist to be completed you will need to steal everything in your sight.

Sometimes the enemy guards will be so tough you will have to sacrifice some of your robbers in a big shootout. But the pay day at the end of it will be much worth it. You will encounter different enemies that will try to prevent you from taking your loot, and you'll need to adapt a unique strategy to get around each of them.

Enjoy the road to becoming a fantastically rich millionaire who has more money than he knows what to do with. But you will also have to invest in your heisting gear and gang of robbers to ensure you are successful in bringing home the money.

Have you ever wondered what it would be like to steal valuable items or rob banks to grow your criminal empire and become ridiculously rich? Then this game is perfect for you. Immerse yourself in a world where everything is yours for the taking. How much money can you get? The sky's the limit!

If you’re really good, this game allows you to make so much money that you will literally be richer than any millionaire. In fact, with the amount of money you can make, millionaires will feel like beggars compared to you! And if that wasn’t enough, think of the power you’ll feel as you lead a massive army of robbers to demolish the opposition and claim extraordinarily valuable treasures for yourself.

Featuring:
- Unique hand crafted heisting levels.
- A colorful gang of robbers to help you
- Progressive upgrade system
- Bonus stealth levels
- Big pay days for you and your crew
- Rapidly increasing wealth system

So what are you waiting for?
Go out there and claim what is rightfully yours!

name: This is Blast!
description:
Dive into This is Blast!, the ultimate color-matching block shooter! Line up your shots, tap to aim, and blast away blocks of matching colors. With simple controls and challenging levels, it’s a game that’s easy to pick up and hard to put down.

From the very first level, This is Blast is easy to pick up but hard to put down. Simply aim, shoot, and watch the tiles merge and burst in spectacular fashion. The deeper you go, the more clever puzzles and tricky obstacles you’ll encounter, making every win feel rewarding and every session fresh.

Features You’ll Love

- Simple and fun mechanics: easy to learn, endlessly satisfying to master
- Explosive combos and chain reactions that clear the board in one move
- Challenging puzzles with creative layouts and obstacles
- Eye-catching visuals and smooth effects for a premium gameplay feel
- Regular updates with new levels and exciting seasonal events

A Game for Every Mood

Whether you want to relax after a long day, challenge your brain with clever puzzles, or chase the thrill of big combos, This is Blast adapts to your style of play. Quick sessions are perfect for short breaks, while longer sessions will keep you hooked as you climb the leaderboard.

Endless Fun, Always Fresh

With hundreds of levels and frequent updates, there’s always something new to discover. Unlock boosters, master powerful strategies, and come back every week for fresh challenges.

Download This is Blast today and experience the most explosive puzzle fun on the App Store

name: Tower Control Manager
description:
Take control of various airport and immerse yourself in the challenging world of ground operations. As the Tower Control Manager your responsibility is to manage the traffic of plane on the ground, ensuring they taxi to the correct runways without delays. Precision is key as you coordinate aircraft movements, guiding plane to their designated spots while avoiding potential crashes and collision with your pilot. The stakes are high—one wrong move can lead to disastrous plane collision or traffic jams on the tarmac. Stay alert on every  airport and plane, where the safety of each plane in your pilot hands.


Features:

- Airport Management: Take control of multiple airport, ensuring smooth plane operations, from takeoff to landing and pilot.
- Realistic Plane Traffic: Manage aircraft traffic on the ground and in the air, guiding plane to their correct runways.
- Plane Collision Avoidance: Prevent plane collision and potential collision during takeoff, landing, and taxiing across the airport. Aviod collision is your pilot main goal.
- Flight Control: Direct every flight from takeoff to landing, ensuring each aircraft follows the correct runway and traffic patterns.
- Pilot Experience: Step into the shoes of a pilot, managing aircraft during intense takeoff and landing scenarios at high traffic airport.
- Jet Traffic Management: Handle jet traffic across your airport, coordinating safe landing and takeoff sequences. Avoid collision between the aircraft with your expert pilot.
- Aircraft Emergency Response: Quickly respond to pilot emergencies to avoid crash and collision on the runway and during flight.
- Runway Operations: Oversee runway traffic at the airport, ensuring safe landing and takeoff for every plane under your command. Airport and pilot are involved to operate all the planes.
- Flight Safety Management: Maintain safety at your airport by preventing plane collision, managing traffic, and ensuring smooth takeoffs and landings.
- Advanced Aircraft Pilot Controls: As a pilot, manage jets through challenging takeoff and landing procedures, avoiding collision and maintaining control of aircraft traffic.

name: Tiny Clash!
description:
Step into the thrilling world of "Tiny Clash," an engaging strategy game where you engage in intense 1v1 battles against opponents from around the world. In this game, you will build and deploy unique structures that summon a variety of powerful units to lead your army to victory. Each building offers distinct units such as wizards with devastating splash damage, brave soldiers, skilled archers, and even mighty dragons.

Gameplay Features:

• Dynamic Building System: 
Strategically place buildings to spawn different units, each with its own unique abilities. Craft your strategy with a variety of options to outmaneuver your opponent.

• Unit Deployment: Directly 
spawn units onto the battlefield without buildings, providing you with the flexibility to adapt quickly to the ever-changing dynamics of the battle.

• Resource Management: 
Your woodcutting building is crucial for success, spawning woodcutters to gather logs. These logs act as mana, essential for deploying units and constructing buildings.

• Upgrades and Progression: 
Strengthen your units by upgrading them. Unlock chests as you win battles, which contain valuable cards to enhance your units and boost your tactical advantages.

• Chest System: 
Earn chests containing cards and resources by completing battles. Use these cards to upgrade your units, unlocking new abilities and making your army more formidable.

• Ranked System: 
Progress through a competitive ranked system, starting as a Beginner and climbing the ranks to reach the prestigious Challenger tier. Each victory brings you closer to the top, showcasing your strategic prowess.

Master the delicate balance between offense and defense, resource gathering and expenditure, and unit upgrading. Each decision can turn the tide of battle. Outsmart and outmaneuver your opponents in intense 1v1 matches and rise through the ranks to become the ultimate champion of "Tiny Clash."

Dive into the fray in "Tiny Clash" and showcase your strategic genius in battles!

◉ And much more!

name: Fort Guardian
description:
Get ready for a unique blend of roguelike action and merge mechanics in Fort Guardian, the ultimate defense game that challenges your strategy and tactics! Can you build the perfect defense and survive the waves of enemies while merging upgrades to strengthen your fort?

Key Features:

• Strategic Merge Mechanics: Merge facilities, traps, and turrets to create the strongest defense possible. Plan carefully within the limited space to defeat your foes!
• Endless Enemy Waves: Face increasingly difficult enemies, each with unique abilities. Adjust your defense and strategy to counter each new wave!
• Choose Your Skills: Pick powerful skills to enhance your defenses. Find the right combinations to maximize your survival chances.
Roguelike Replayability: Every playthrough is different! With dynamic challenges and random elements, each game will keep you on your toes.
• Upgrade and Evolve: Unlock new facilities, merge upgrades, and level up your defenses as you progress.
• Intense Combat: Engage in fast-paced, tactical combat, where every decision counts and only the best strategies will prevail.


Merge, strategize, and defend your fort against endless waves of enemies in Fort Guardian! Download now to test your skills and become the ultimate guardian!

description:
Welcome Hex Warriors!

Hex Takeover is a turned-based strategy game played on different hexagonal boards. The objective is simple: conquer the most tiles to win.

How To Play:
During your turn tap on any of your tiles to chose your next move. Tiles can be cloned to adjacent spaces or they can jump to further spaces. Landing near opponent tiles will convert their tiles into yours! Cloning and Jumping have different implications on your strategy. Cloning a piece means that you get more tiles of your color on the board. Jumping sometimes could be beneficial if you spot enemy pieces further away but want to conquer them. The game ends when the board is filled up with tiles!

Seems easy right? Let's put your skills to the test!

Hex Takeover has simple game rules, yet the game can be quite a bit challenging! With different levels and varying difficulties, there are tons of different strategies to explore.

This game is fun, challenging and relaxing at the same time. It tests your spatial skills, your reflexes and your creativity. The game is not just about simply pulling down buildings and killing zombies. You need to formulate reasonable strategies according to different building structures and zombie types. Découvrez de nombreuses questions mises à jour régulièrement pour tester votre culture générale sur les thèmes suivants : Art, Littérature, Business, Consommation, Divertissement, Médias, Géographie, Populations, Histoire, Actualité, Science, Nature, Sports, Loisirs, Problèmes, Calculs.

DEVENEZ LE CHAMPION
Affrontez vos amis autour de questions drôles, instructives et insolites pour prouver que vous êtes le plus intelligent. Utilisez le Chat pour chambrer vos amis et montez dans le Classement pour devenir le champion !

name: Tower Takeover
description:
Drag your citizens from one tower to another, and take over the whole city!
Simple and exciting controls, hundreds of levels and endless surprises!

name: TrampoFlip
description: Jump on trampolines! Flip as much as you can and reach the stars! However, be careful not to land on your head!

name: Word Grid! Guess The Words
description:
Every letter has its place. Can you find it?

WordGrid is a word puzzle with a twist - every letter must form a real word in both its row AND its column. Drag and swap tiles, watch the colors shift, and think your way to the solution.

Simple to Learn, Hard to Master
Swap letter tiles to build words across the grid. Real-time color feedback tells you what's right, what's close, and what's wrong — so every move teaches you something. No timers. No rush. Just think.

1,000+ Levels
Work your way through a massive campaign spanning Easy, Medium, and Hard puzzles. Start with compact 4x4 grids and advance to brain-bending 6x6 boards.

Daily Challenge
A fresh puzzle every day, the same for everyone. Track your streak, then share your results with friends.

Helpful When You're Stuck
Undo a move, reveal a letter, or add extra swaps - one free undo per puzzle, and more boosters earned through play.

Features:
Drag-and-swap mechanic with dual-constraint word solving
1,000 campaign levels with progressive difficulty
Daily puzzle with streak tracking
3 grid sizes: 4x4, 5x5, and 6x6
Fully playable offline
No account required

name: えいごでレース！
description:
約1000人が参加する英単語を題材にしたサバイバルレースで最後の１人になるまで勝ち残りましょう！

■他のランナーより多くの英単語を正解させよう！
・出題される日本語の単語を英語で答えて正解すると文字の数だけランナーが走ります

■遊びながら気軽に英単語を楽しく学べる！・正解の文字数がわかります
・入力文字をその場でマルバツ判定・わからない問題を「スキップ」で飛ばすと答えが表示されます

■あなたに合ったレベルで遊べる！
・小学校〜高校、さらにTOIECまで遊べる難易度は様々

■スキンで着せ替え！
・ゲームのミッションを達成して様々なスキンをアンロックすることができます

勝者はonly one! いざ、let’s race!

簡単に老けないで！肌年齢、血液年齢、心は永遠に若いまま・・・人生の終着点まで辿り着こう。

description:
